Author: xintingjiang_36756
Content:
When I run the DRC check using the provided GF180 project template in the Nix shell enviornment (with only the pad rings included) encountered about 104 errors. Author: mole99
Content: @Evansika That looks like an error I had already fixed. Could you please verify that your PDK is up to date?

Content: Yes, it passed when i updated the pdk. Thanks!

Author: xintingjiang_36756
Content: Oh i found that i still got 11 antenna violations with the empty template with pad frame. Are these critical?

Author: mole99
Content:
@Evansika Did you update your template repo as well?
The antenna violations in the default template have been fixed with this PR: https://github.com/wafer-space/gf180mcu-project-template/pull/24

Author: xintingjiang_36756

I am running on my M4 MAC in the nix environment, when I launch the nix shell, there were 2 skip and 1 fail see attached, I am not sure if this has something to do with the drc errors.

Author: _luke_w_
Content: I also get magic/klayout XORs on my macbook but not on my Linux desktop

Author: _luke_w_
Content: for now just working around it by using the Linux machine when I care about DRC.  Is that an option for you OP?

Author: _luke_w_
Content: Also all of the magic DRCs I get are just complaints about filler cells being placed on top of themselves. As far as I'm aware this is harmless and other people have reported it too.

Author: xintingjiang_36756
Content: yes it works on linux. We will run on Linux when it comes to drc. Thanks!
